data.rationale: The comments show some depth in content but lack robust discussion and useful information for potential viewers.
data.reasoning: The analysis reveals that while there is some depth in content discussion, the overall quality of discussion is limited, and the comments do not provide substantial epistemic value for viewers.

branch_1.name: Content Depth
branch_1.rationale: Some comments engage with the content of the video, discussing artists and their contributions, but many are superficial expressions of support.

branch_2.name: Discussion Quality
branch_2.rationale: The comments largely consist of isolated one-liners with minimal back-and-forth or nuanced discussion.

branch_3.name: Epistemic Value
branch_3.rationale: While some comments provide personal insights and reactions, they lack substantial information that would be useful for viewers before watching.
